@testing-library/dom: Multiple versions of @testing-library/dom cause issues with user-event
That's why @testing-library/dom has been added to resolutions.
NOTE: This can be removed after dependencies don't bring conflicting/old versions
@tootallnate/once: @tootallnate/once vulnerable to Incorrect Control Flow Scoping in versions <3.0.1
Pinning to >=3.0.1 via react-helsinki-headless-cms > jest-environment-jsdom > jsdom > http-proxy-agent > @tootallnate/once
NOTE: This can be removed when react-helsinki-headless-cms no longer resolves vulnerable @tootallnate/once versions
@types/cookie: To use the last known @types/cookie version, only for <v1 cookie
NOTE: This can be removed if all dependencies start to depend on >=v1 cookie
@types/react: Several packages may still resolve different @types/react versions
Pinning @types/react to v19 keeps typechecking consistent with React v19
NOTE: This can be removed when transitive dependencies are aligned on @types/react v19
globals: Old versions of globals coming from non-eslint dependencies contain a bug that breaks eslint:
Key languageOptions: Key globals: Global AudioWorkletGlobalScope has leading or trailing whitespace
NOTE: This can be removed when non-eslint dependencies don't bring old versions of globals anymore
draft-js/immutable and @types/draft-js/i: To force a patched immutable version for transitive dependencies in draft-js stack still requesting immutable 3.x
NOTE: This can be removed when draft-js stack no longer depends on vulnerable immutable 3.7.x
**/@ardatan/relay-compiler/immutable: To force a patched immutable 3.x version for graphql-codegen relay compiler chain
NOTE: This can be removed when @ardatan/relay-compiler no longer depends on immutable 3.7.x
immutable@~3.7.6: To force immutable 3.8.3 for dependencies still requesting immutable ~3.7.6
NOTE: This can be removed when transitive dependencies no longer request immutable ~3.7.6
immutable@^5.0.2: To force immutable ^5.1.5 for dependencies requesting immutable ^5.0.2 (e.g. sass)
NOTE: This can be removed when transitive dependencies stop resolving vulnerable immutable 5.1.2
**/jest-util/picomatch and **/micromatch: To force patched picomatch for vulnerable graphql-codegen transitive chains
NOTE: This can be removed when transitive dependencies stop requiring picomatch 2.3.1
hds-react/@babel/runtime: NOTE: This can be removed if hds-react doesn't require a fixed version of this package anymore
hds-react/cookie: NOTE: This can be removed if hds-react starts to depend on >=v1 cookie
hds-react/minimatch: minimatch has multiple ReDoS vulnerabilities (CVE-1113465, CVE-1113544, CVE-1113552)
in versions <9.0.7. Pinning to >=9.0.7 fixes all three issues.
NOTE: This can be removed when hds-react updates @typescript-eslint/parser to use minimatch >=9.0.7
lodash: Pinning lodash to >=4.18.1 fixes prototype pollution vulnerabilities
NOTE: This can be removed when all transitive dependencies use patched lodash versions
doctoc/underscore: To force patched underscore for doctoc transitive dependency
NOTE: This can be removed when doctoc no longer resolves underscore <1.13.8
tmp: tmp allows arbitrary temporary file/directory write via symbolic link in versions <0.2.4
Pinning to >=0.2.4 via @graphql-codegen/cli > inquirer > external-editor > tmp
NOTE: This can be removed when @graphql-codegen/cli no longer resolves vulnerable tmp versions
